title: Festival Color Run
summary: Joyful crowd mid-color-powder explosion at Holi - rainbow chaos and pure happiness.
prompt: A joyful crowd of festival-goers at a Holi color-run mid-celebration: massive clouds of vivid powdered pigment (saffron orange, fuchsia pink, electric blue, lime green, sun yellow) bursting through the air, laughing people with paint-streaked faces jumping with arms raised. Late-afternoon golden sunlight cutting through the haze. Telephoto compression, action-frozen, Magnum-photo journalism style. Pure unfiltered joy.
